context.usage: Shows a small ring at touch/click position for web builds.

acceptance_criteria: Ring thickness is 1px; center is transparent in both frames.
Uses only #FF004D or #1D2B53 pixels and transparency; no gradients.

reference_images.label: hud_widget_doc
reference_images.purpose: Bottom HUD layout, care popup placement, and touch-safe spacing anchor.

reference_images.label: care_system_doc
reference_images.purpose: Feed, clean, and pet interaction timing plus UI icon anchor.

reference_images.label: game_direction_doc
reference_images.purpose: Core loop, care mechanic, and no-fail pet fantasy anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteSheetBundle for ui asset loading with nearest-neighbor sampling and deterministic z-order.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/touch_indicator_2f.png through AssetServer and store the handle under touch_indicator_2f.
runtime_notes: Anchor UI sprites in screen space inside the 128x128 logical canvas and clamp to whole pixels before render.
Register manifest execution_order in a startup resource so build order stays deterministic during content validation.
Read frame size and bounds from specs.dimensions_px rather than texture metadata during runtime checks.
